message:
feat(engine): add adversarial campaign suppression gate binary and CLI tests

New binary `franken_adversarial_campaign_gate` that evaluates campaign
suppression metrics from a JSON input fixture, checking statistical
significance (p <= 0.05), baseline runtime coverage (>= 2), continuous
run evidence, trend point count, and escalation SLA compliance.  Writes
a structured gate_result.json with pass/fail verdict.

- src/bin/franken_adversarial_campaign_gate.rs — gate evaluator binary
- tests/adversarial_campaign_gate_cli.rs — CLI integration tests
- tests/fixtures/adversarial_campaign_gate_input_v1.json — input fixture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
